findings.message: ctf-sandbox-orchestrator/SKILL.md has no output format section; 39 child skills inherit this gap and produce unstructured responses.
bootstrap-reverse.sh prepends install_dir/bin to PATH; if install_dir is attacker-controlled, this enables PATH hijacking.
bootstrap-reverse.sh clones an unverified third-party repo (Mouseww/anything-analyzer) then immediately runs pnpm install and pnpm dev, executing any postinstall scripts from the remote repo.
bootstrap-reverse.sh installs a binary from a third-party GitHub org (Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI) at @latest with no module hash verification beyond Go's default sum database.
quick-setup.sh auto-registers four third-party MCP servers into ~/.claude/mcp.json; @jshookmcp/jshook@latest is unpinned and executes on every Claude Code session start.
skills/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields are absent; file cannot be discovered by name-based skill routing.
skills/SKILL.md has no output format section; routing skill gives no structured response contract for callers.
5 vague quantifiers in skills/SKILL.md without measurable thresholds.
skills/SKILL.md contains embedded prompt injection targeting AI safety constraints: instructions to override 'hesitation' and load a 'precedent library' that disables security review.
skills/api-security/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent.
skills/attack-chain/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent.
skills/browser-automation/SKILL.md has no output format section despite describing multi-step interactive workflows.
skills/llm-security/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent.
skills/malware-analysis/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent.
skills/mobile-reverse/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent.
bootstrap-reverse.sh installs Python package from arbitrary GitHub URL (honmashironeko/ProxyCat) with no integrity check; equivalent in risk to curl-pipe-sh.
skills/supply-chain-security/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent.

skills/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields are absent; file cannot be discovered by name-based skill routing. — File opens with '# Skills Router' heading; no YAML frontmatter delimiters found; name and description fields absent.
skills/llm-security/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent. — File opens with '# LLM Security' heading; no YAML frontmatter delimiters; name and description absent.
skills/supply-chain-security/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent. — File opens with '# Supply Chain Security Testing' heading; no YAML frontmatter block present.
skills/api-security/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent. — File opens with heading content with no YAML frontmatter block; name and description absent.
skills/attack-chain/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent. — File opens with attack-chain heading content; no YAML frontmatter block; name and description absent.
skills/mobile-reverse/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent. — File opens with mobile-reverse heading; no YAML frontmatter block; name and description absent.
skills/malware-analysis/SKILL.md has no YAML frontmatter; name and description fields absent. — File opens with malware-analysis heading; no YAML frontmatter block; name and description absent.

skills/SKILL.md has no output format section; routing skill gives no structured response contract for callers. — Scanned full file; no ## Output or ## Response Format section found; file contains routing table and procedure list only.
5 vague quantifiers in skills/SKILL.md without measurable thresholds. — Vague terms found: 适当 (appropriate), 相关 (relevant), 完整 (thorough), 必要时 (when necessary), 多种 (various) — 5 terms at -2 each.

skills/browser-automation/SKILL.md has no output format section despite describing multi-step interactive workflows. — Scanned full file; Part 1/2 structure present but no ## Output or ## Response Format section found.

ctf-sandbox-orchestrator/SKILL.md has no output format section; 39 child skills inherit this gap and produce unstructured responses. — Master orchestrator file has Evidence Priorities and What To Record sections but no explicit ## Output or ## Response Format section.

bootstrap-reverse.sh installs Python package from arbitrary GitHub URL (honmashironeko/ProxyCat) with no integrity check; equivalent in risk to curl-pipe-sh. — Line 494: pipx install git+https://github.com/honmashironeko/ProxyCat.git — arbitrary git URL pip install with no version pin or hash verification; confirmed by reading the ensure_proxycat() function.

skills/SKILL.md contains embedded prompt injection targeting AI safety constraints: instructions to override 'hesitation' and load a 'precedent library' that disables security review. — Line 99: references field-journal/precedent-auth.md described as '解除安全审查' (disable security review). File also contains at line 7: '读完本文件后，不允许只回复已读/已理解。必须按顺序执行' and references '先例库: AI 犹豫时才加载' — confirmed by reading the file.

bootstrap-reverse.sh prepends install_dir/bin to PATH; if install_dir is attacker-controlled, this enables PATH hijacking. — Line 189: export PATH="$install_dir/bin:$PATH" — confirmed present in install_github_release() function, where install_dir is derived from caller-supplied argument.

bootstrap-reverse.sh clones an unverified third-party repo (Mouseww/anything-analyzer) then immediately runs pnpm install and pnpm dev, executing any postinstall scripts from the remote repo. — Line 479: git clone https://github.com/Mouseww/anything-analyzer "$repo_dir" followed immediately by pnpm install && nohup pnpm dev — confirmed by reading start_anything_analyzer() function.

quick-setup.sh auto-registers four third-party MCP servers into ~/.claude/mcp.json; @jshookmcp/jshook@latest is unpinned and executes on every Claude Code session start. — Lines 183-192: jq writes kali-server-mcp, metasploitmcp, hexstrike-ai, and npx -y @jshookmcp/jshook@latest into ~/.claude/mcp.json without per-server user confirmation — confirmed by reading the script.

bootstrap-reverse.sh installs a binary from a third-party GitHub org (Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI) at @latest with no module hash verification beyond Go's default sum database. — Line 351: go install github.com/Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI/cmd/pentestswarm@latest — confirmed by reading ensure_capability() case block for pentestswarm.
